allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); props=d.get\(''contributes'',{}\).get\(''configuration'',{}\).get\(''properties'',{}\); [print\(k,'':'', v.get\(''description'',''''\)[:80]\) for k in props if ''biome'' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) configs = d.get\(''contributes'',{}\).get\(''configuration'',[]\) if isinstance\(configs, dict\): configs = [configs] for c in configs: for k,v in c.get\(''properties'',{}\).items\(\): print\(k\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) configs = d.get\(''contributes'',{}\).get\(''configuration'',[]\) if isinstance\(configs, dict\): configs = [configs] for c in configs: for k,v in c.get\(''properties'',{}\).items\(\): if ''bin'' in k.lower\(\) or ''enabled'' in k.lower\(\): print\(k, '':'', json.dumps\(v, indent=2\)[:300]\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(''=== activationEvents ===''\) for e in d.get\(''activationEvents'',[]\): print\(e\) print\(\) print\(''=== documentSelector \(in contributes\) ===''\) langs = d.get\(''contributes'',{}\) # Look for language IDs import re text = json.dumps\(langs\) css_mentions = [m.start\(\) for m in re.finditer\(''css'', text, re.IGNORECASE\)] for pos in css_mentions[:10]: print\(text[max\(0,pos-30\):pos+50]\) ")
